title: Minecraft Bedrock Point Light Settings 1.21.40
description: Point light color settings for Vibrant Visuals. Maps block identifiers to their emitted light colors.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these point light settings.

minecraft:point_light_settings.description: The root object containing point light color definitions.

colors.description: A map of block identifiers to their emitted light color.

color.description: A color value expressed as either an RGB array of three numbers in the 0-255 range, or a six-digit hexadecimal string.
